history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi there! I see you're ordering for two people. What would you like for yourself? We have a Big Mac, McChicken, or Quarter Pounder. I'd recommend the McChicken for a lighter option.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Хм... у меня лактазная недостаточность — можно Макчичен без молока? А мой друг веган, есть ли веганский вариант?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great to hear! For your lactose intolerance, we can make the McChicken lactose-free (no milk added). For your vegan friend, we do have a vegan McFlurry (dairy-free dessert) and sweet potato fries (vegan option). What would you like for yourself? And what would your friend want?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Да, Макчичен без молока для меня. А мой друг — веганский Макфлурри и картофель фри. Калории подойдут?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! For you: Lactose-free McChicken (320 kcal). For your friend: Vegan McFlurry (300 kcal) + Sweet Potato Fries (200 kcal). Total: 820 kcal for both — perfect for a light meal. Would you like to adjust anything or confirm this order? 😊

history.speaker: client
history.text: Хм... 820 ккал — слишком мало. Нужно больше. Что можно добавить?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: To boost calories, we can add a Big Gulp (200 kcal) for each person — that would bring total to 1220 kcal. Or add regular fries (300 kcal) for you, totaling 1120 kcal. Which option would you prefer? 😊

history.speaker: client
history.text: Хорошо, ещё Big Gulp — 1420 ккал. Без молока, веган для друга.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Perfect! For you: Lactose-free McChicken (320 kcal) + 2 Big Gulps (400 kcal). For your friend: Vegan McFlurry (300 kcal) + Sweet Potato Fries (200 kcal). Total: 1,420 kcal. Ready to go? 😊

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed! Lactose-free McChicken + 2 Big Gulps for you, vegan McFlurry + sweet potato fries for your friend (1,420 kcal total). Anything else you'd like to add? 😊

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Спасибо за заказ! Удачи вам с едой! 😊
